# The Crypt of Civilization

## Overview

The Crypt of Civilization is a sealed chamber in Georgia intended to be opened in the year 8113, preserving for the distant future a curated greeting and record of twentieth-century life.

## Who chose what it carried

The vault was overseen by a small committee of scholars who spent months arguing over what a curated portrait of an entire era should contain. They selected and arranged everything that went into it: spoken greetings in many human languages, the recorded voices and sounds of the age, an archive of music drawn from many cultures and decades, and a long sequence of photographs depicting people, landscapes, and the chemistry of life. Every inclusion was debated, because the committee knew the vault might be the only trace of them that ever survived.
